capture_method: wayback-pin via Save-Page-Now (curl -sI -L --user-agent "cdo-preserve/1.0" https://web.archive.org/save/{url}); SHA-256 of Wayback-fetched content computed but bytes not stored locally
notes: First wayback-pin capture in the Project Memory archive. cardanocube.com ToS is 'All rights reserved' so bytes are not mirrored locally; the Wayback Machine holds the content and this archive holds the chain-of-custody reference.
